lint.command: source .venv/bin/activate && ruff check src/ tests/ && source .venv/bin/activate && black --check src/ tests/

blockingIssues.description: The reviewed implementation commit `de16738` only introduces mission scaffolding files and makes no changes to the feature's scoped parser contract, schema, or test surfaces, so the handoff's implementation claim remains unsupported by the diff. No follow-up fix feature in this rerun addressed that blocking review.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten rust-parser-worker enforcement around test-first workflow and require workers to explicitly escalate when a feature appears pre-satisfied instead of attaching an unrelated commit to the handoff.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: `freeze-parser-contract-foundation` still fails because handoff commit `de16738` only adds mission scaffolding and does not touch parser/schema/test surfaces for the claimed feature implementation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require handoff commit IDs to identify the functional fix commit(s), not only later style-only follow-ups, so scrutiny can trace the true implementation without reconstructing adjacent history.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The passing review for `fix-rust-touch-debounce-suppression` had to inspect both `c5d7360` and the handoff's recorded `ce14781` because the handoff pointed at a style-only commit while the actual debounce repair lived in the prior commit.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Enforce recording the required manual CLI sanity check whenever parser behavior changes are user-observable and verification steps call for an analyze/report run with inspection.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: `fix-parser-marker-kickoff-role-inference` passed code review, but the worker transcript and handoff did not record the feature's required CLI analyze/manual kickoff-role inspection despite changing observable parser output semantics.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add a standalone typecheck command to services.yaml for parser-contract scrutiny.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous: this repo's milestone manifest currently defines test, lint, format, Rust build/test, corpus-health, and CLI checks, but no factual standalone typecheck command was established during this scrutiny run.

rejectedObservations.observation: Apply a guidance update for the unrelated `services.yaml.bak` file appearing in a fix commit.
rejectedObservations.reason: rejected for now: the scope-creep observation is real but feature-specific, and a systemic process change was less justified than the higher-confidence guidance items above.
